testimonials.title: What our community says
testimonials.subtitle: Families, teachers and professionals who have already transformed their practice.
testimonials.t1_text: "Thanks to EducaNeuro I was able to better understand my son with autism. The courses are clear, empathetic and truly applicable at home."
testimonials.t1_role: Mother of a child with ASD
testimonials.t2_text: "The webinar on inclusive classrooms changed the way I plan lessons. Now I have concrete strategies for every student with different needs."
testimonials.t3_text: "As an occupational therapist, I found quality training with a neuroaffirmative approach at EducaNeuro. The content is current and evidence-based."

about.title: Specialist in neurodiversity and inclusive education
about.intro: I am a therapist and educator with over 10 years of experience supporting families, teachers and professionals on the neurodiversity journey. I created EducaNeuro because I believe accessible knowledge transforms lives.
about.cred1: Master's in Special Education and Inclusion
about.cred3: Training in neuroaffirmative approach and DIR/Floortime
about.cred4: Speaker at inclusive education congresses in Latin America

leadmagnet.title: Guide: 10 strategies to support your child with autism at home
leadmagnet.desc: Download our practical guide with activities, routines and evidence-based tips. No cost, no complications.

sobre.title: Specialist in neurodiversity and inclusive education
sobre.p1: Inclusive psychopedagogue with a neuroaffirmative approach and master's candidate in neurodevelopmental conditions, with experience in
sobre.p2: I provide individualized support to children and adolescents with neurodevelopmental conditions, learning difficulties and neurotypical profiles, promoting their
sobre.p3: Specialist in curriculum adaptation design, executive functions, literacy, social skills and emotional regulation from a
sobre.p4: I work in coordination with teachers, families and multidisciplinary teams to create
sobre.p4_end: , strengthen autonomy and enhance every student's comprehensive development.
sobre.pi1d: Psychopedagogue. Master's candidate in neurodevelopmental conditions.
sobre.pi4d: Accompany processes that generate well-being and autonomy.
sobre.talleres_desc: I conduct workshops for parents, educators and teachers on:
sobre.v1d: I value neurological differences as a natural part of human diversity.
sobre.v2d: I listen, understand and support with respect for each person and their story.
sobre.v3d: I focus on enhancing the skills and talents of each student.
sobre.v4d: I work as a team with families, teachers and professionals for better results.
sobre.v5d: I promote practical skills that generate autonomy and well-being in daily life.
sobre.cta_bold: My commitment is to keep learning to better support others.
sobre.cta_sub: Every person has unique potential, and my mission is to help it flourish.
sobre.cta_right: If you are a parent, educator or teacher and want training or a workshop for your group, write to me! It will be a pleasure to accompany you.
sobre.quote: I believe in an education that understands, includes and enhances the strengths of each person.
